channel.title: SSbreakingHeadlines
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbreakingHeadlines, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Nationwide battle over redistricting escalates
item.description: The fight to redraw the nation’s congressional maps is escalating as Virginia asks its own Supreme Court to pause the ruling that struck down a new ma...

item.title: Martha Stewart: How to make an omelet
item.description: In her latest book, "The Martha Way," Martha Stewart shares her classic methods for cooking – the building blocks essential to every home chef.

item.title: Hantavirus live updates: Evacuations begin after MV Hondius arrives in Canary Islands
item.description: The MV Hondius cruise ship, on which the hantavirus infection was identified, is making its way to the Canary Islands.

item.title: WATCH: Five passengers are the first to leave the hantavirus-hit cruise ship MV Hondius
item.description: The passengers dressed in protective clothing and masks were escorted to the shore and expected to continue on flights back to their home countries.
